site.name: He Shan's Homepage
site.bio: He Shan is a Research Fellow at the National University of Singapore working on sustainable technologies at the air-water-energy-food nexus, including atmospheric water harvesting, electronics thermal management, urban agriculture, and building energy efficiency.

zh.title: 可持续水-能源-食物系统研究员
zh.affiliation: 新加坡国立大学电气与计算机工程系
zh.bio: 何山关注空气-水-能源-食物交叉系统中的可持续技术，研究方向包括大气集水、电子热管理、城市农业、建筑能效，以及从材料到系统的热力学与传递建模。
